summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Zitex Website Builder Feb 2026 release. All 17 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) 25 categories including new cosmetics, automotive, realestate, (2) 25 layouts per category, (3) Category-specific image library working correctly (restaurant gets restaurant photos, plumbing gets plumbing photos), (4) Full wizard flow E2E with palette application and auto-advance, (5) Realestate sample_listings auto-seed with commission_pct, (6) Cosmetics & Automotive verticals with correct dashboard_tabs, (7) Final preview build with floating widgets (zx-whatsapp, zx-sticky, zx-countdown).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed projects during testing (cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feb 2026 release fully tested. Key features verified: (1) category_images.py correctly maps 200+ curated photos per category - restaurant layouts get restaurant photos (1414235077428, 1559339352), plumbing gets plumbing photos (1542013936693, 1585704032915). (2) 3 new categories added: cosmetics (💄), automotive (🏎️), realestate (🏛️) - each with 25 layouts. (3) Wizard auto-advance after palette selection works via applyPalette() in WebsiteStudio.js line 1403. (4) Realestate vertical auto-seeds 3 sample_listings with commission_pct (villa 2.5M, apartment 850K, land 1.8M). (5) Cosmetics uses ecommerce vertical, automotive uses dedicated automotive vertical. (6) Floating widgets (whatsapp_float, sticky_phone, countdown) render correctly with zx-* CSS classes.

test_classes: TestCategoriesAPI (2 tests) - PASSED: 25 categories verified, cosmetics/automotive/realestate present
TestLayoutsPerCategory (6 tests) - PASSED: restaurant/plumbing/jewelry/cosmetics/automotive/realestate each have 25 layouts
TestImageLibraryCorrectness (2 tests) - PASSED: Restaurant has restaurant images, plumbing has plumbing images
TestFullWizardFlowE2E (1 test) - PASSED: Create→apply-palette→answer steps→build flow works
TestRealestateVertical (1 test) - PASSED: 3 listings seeded with commission_pct
TestCosmeticsAutomotiveVerticals (2 tests) - PASSED: Both verticals create correctly
TestFinalPreviewBuild (1 test) - PASSED: HTML has proper structure and widget classes
TestWizardStepsAPI (1 test) - PASSED: Wizard steps metadata returned
